# Vue_Studies

- Languages: Vue;
- Softwares/Work Tools: 'V.S. Code';
- Resume: A repository of Vue.Js learning resources with exercises and mini-projects covering logic, games, and simple applications;
- Last Update Date: 07/04/2026;

## 📂 Structure

- `games/` → Small games to practice logic and components; 
- `programs/` → Simple applications with UI and features;

## 📘 Docs & References

- [Official Documentation](https://br.vuejs.org/v2/guide/)  
- [Online Compiler](https://play.vuejs.org/#)
